title: hedysarum ammoxylon
intro: Hedysarum ammoxylon, also known as Amur hedysarum, is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of East Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Hedysarum ammoxylon can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is also used in traditional medicine in various forms, including dried roots and leaves.
